sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root סָבַב)-

(1) subst. seats set round, triclinium, couches set in a circle, in the Oriental manner, Son 1:12 comp. the root סָבַב 1Sa 16:11.

(2) adv. round about, 1Ki 6:29 plur. מְסִבֹּות id., Job 37:12.

(3) plur. constr. prep. around, about, 2Ki 23:5, מְסִבֵּי יְרוּשָׁלַיִם “around Jerusalem.”
